content:
To use the AI model, you need to set up your API key.

**How to fix this:**
1. Get your API key from your AI provider
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Add your API key for your AI provider
4. Save and try again

**Don't have an API key?**
• Sign up at your AI provider's website
• Create an API key in your account settings
• Copy it and paste it here

**Your conversations and work are safe** - this is just a setup step!
